emails.subject: Analysts
emails.body: Errol and Phillip, Can we get together on Thursday or Friday to discuss the Utility Track for the 2 new Analysts that will join your group this summer. The objective of this track is to have the 2 analysts serve in a Business Unit, but rotate function/roles as needs change. We need to identify responsibilities the analysts could have at each desk. Please let me know what time works best for you. Regards, Melissa Prihoda
